display.purpose: Page titles and post titles. The largest type on the site; never larger than 3rem.

sans.purpose: Navigation, labels, dates, tags, UI. The wayfinding layer.

body.purpose: All prose. Newsreader, capped at 68ch. The reading unit.

label.purpose: Small UI text: dates, tags, next/prev labels, footer.

motion.name: ease-out-quick
motion.purpose: Default for link underline color transitions and opacity hover states.

components.name: Post List Item
components.description: The dashed-leader row: title, flexible dashed leader, date — with serif-italic tags on a second line. The site's signature component.
components.html:
On reading slowly

24/06reading, notes
components.css: .ds-post-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: auto 1fr auto; column-gap: 6px; align-items: center; line-height: 1.375; font-family: var(--font-geist), system-ui, sans-serif; color: oklch(0.274 0.006 286); text-decoration: none; opacity: 0.8; transition: opacity 0.2s ease-out; } .ds-post-row:hover { opacity: 1; } .ds-post-title { font-size: 0.875rem; max-width: 30ch; overflow: hidden; white-space: nowrap; margin: 0; } .ds-post-leader { border: none; border-bottom: 1px dashed oklch(0.922 0.004 286); height: 1px; width: 100%; align-self: end; margin: 0 0 0.3rem 0; } .ds-post-date { font-size: 0.75rem; opacity: 0.5; text-align: end; align-self: end; } .ds-post-tags { display: block; opacity: 0.5; font-size: 0.875rem; font-family: var(--font-newsreader), Georgia, serif; font-style: italic; grid-column: 1 / -1; }

components.name: In-prose Link
components.description: Underlined link inside prose. Thin underline that deepens on hover. Never a background fill or pill.
components.html: This is a sentence with an in-prose link inside it.
components.css: .ds-prose { font-family: var(--font-newsreader), Georgia, serif; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.75; color: oklch(0.274 0.006 286); max-width: 68ch; } .ds-link { color: inherit; text-decoration: underline; text-underline-offset: 0.2rem; text-decoration-thickness: 0.05em; text-decoration-color: oklch(0.705 0.009 286); transition: text-decoration-color 0.2s ease-out; } .ds-link:hover { text-decoration-color: oklch(0.274 0.006 286); }

components.name: Header (floating nav pill)
components.description: Fixed floating pill at bottom on mobile / top on desktop. Backdrop-blur, soft gradient ambient lift. Menu toggle + theme toggle inside.
components.html: InicioPostsPlaylistsMarcadores
components.css: .ds-header { position: fixed; bottom: 16px; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 20; display: flex; justify-content: center; } .ds-header-pill { width: 100%; max-width: 672px; display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 24px; background-color: oklch(0.823 0.003 74 / 0.5); backdrop-filter: blur(4px); border: 1px solid oklch(0.588 0.004 74 / 0.2); font-family: var(--font-geist), system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.274 0.006 286); position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .ds-header-pill::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: -1; background: linear-gradient(to top right, oklch(0.588 0.004 74 / 0.2), oklch(0.460 0.003 74 / 0.1), oklch(0.588 0.006 286 / 0.2)); filter: blur(24px); } .ds-menu-btn { background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; font: inherit; font-weight: 500; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; color: inherit; } .ds-menu-dots { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; width: 12px; height: 12px; gap: 1px; } .ds-menu-dots span { width: 5px; height: 5px; background: oklch(0.274 0.006 286); display: block; } .ds-menu { display: grid; gap: 6px; width: 100%; order: 1; } .ds-menu a { color: inherit; text-decoration: none; opacity: 0.8; transition: opacity 0.2s ease-out; } .ds-menu a:hover { opacity: 1; } .ds-theme-btn { background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; color: inherit; font-size: 1rem; } @media (min-width: 768px) { .ds-header { bottom: auto; top: 48px; } .ds-menu { order: 2; display: flex; flex-direction: row; gap: 16px; width: auto; } }

components.name: Blockquote
components.description: A 1px lime left stripe with indented body. The only place Garden Lime appears as a border. Stripe is exactly 1px — never wider.
components.html: A sentence worth pulling out of the prose.
components.css: .ds-quote { border-left: 1px solid oklch(0.839 0.179 122); padding-left: 16px; margin: 32px 0; font-family: var(--font-newsreader), Georgia, serif; color: oklch(0.274 0.006 286); } .ds-quote p { margin: 0; line-height: 1.625; }

components.name: Message (callout)
components.description: Lime-tinted callout for personal notes. A 16%-opacity gradient tint via ::before — never a solid lime fill. Links inside use lime-500 underline.
components.html: Mejorando Linkeee. Si tienes sugerencias, dime.
components.css: .ds-message { position: relative; border-radius: 10px; overflow: hidden; padding: 16px 20px; background-color: oklch(0.870 0.002 74); } .ds-message-tint { position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 0; pointer-events: none; background-image: linear-gradient(135deg, oklch(0.839 0.179 122 / 0.16) 0%, oklch(0.839 0.179 122 / 0.02) 100%); } .ds-message-body { position: relative; z-index: 1; font-family: var(--font-newsreader), Georgia, serif; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.4; color: oklch(0.274 0.006 286); } .ds-message-body p { margin: 0; } .ds-message-body a { color: inherit; text-decoration: underline; text-decoration-color: oklch(0.768 0.188 122); } .ds-message-body a:hover { text-decoration-color: oklch(0.665 0.193 122); }

components.name: Featured Music (playlist card)
components.description: Album art + release metadata + streaming links. Small variant for annual playlists. Square cover, rounded image.
components.html:
Juan Berrios

2026

SpotifyApple Music
components.css: .ds-music { display: flex; gap: 16px; align-items: flex-start; padding: 12px 0; } .ds-music-art { width: 88px; height: 88px; border-radius: 10px; object-fit: cover; } .ds-music-meta { display: grid; gap: 4px; font-family: var(--font-geist), system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-music-artist { margin: 0; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: oklch(0.274 0.006 286); } .ds-music-release { margin: 0; font-size: 0.75rem; opacity: 0.5; } .ds-music-links { display: flex; gap: 12px; margin-top: 6px; } .ds-music-links a { font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.274 0.006 286); text-decoration: underline; text-underline-offset: 0.2rem; text-decoration-thickness: 0.05em; text-decoration-color: oklch(0.705 0.009 286); transition: text-decoration-color 0.2s ease-out; } .ds-music-links a:hover { text-decoration-color: oklch(0.274 0.006 286); }

components.name: Prose Container
components.description: The reading unit: 68ch max-width, Newsreader, 1.75 leading. Headings switch to Inter Tight with 0.02em tracking.
components.html:
On reading slowly

The post column is the reading unit, not the page width. This container is capped at 68 characters and uses a transitional serif at 1.75 line-height for sustained reading.
components.css: .ds-post { max-width: 68ch; font-family: var(--font-newsreader), Georgia, serif; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.75; color: oklch(0.274 0.006 286); } .ds-post p { margin-block: 20px; } .ds-post h2 { font-family: var(--font-interdisplay), system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.02em; line-height: 1.45; margin-top: 44px; margin-bottom: 4px; }

narrative.overview:
This is a hand-bound literary journal on the web — calm, considered, editorial. The prose is the point; everything else gets out of its way. The system pairs a reading-first serif (Newsreader) with a tight grotesque display (Inter Tight) and a quiet geometric sans for navigation (Geist), so the eye always knows whether it's reading, orienting, or navigating. Whitespace is the primary material, not a leftover.

The site explicitly rejects SaaS landing-page tropes — no hero-metric stat blocks, no gradient accents, no saturated banner sections, no identical icon-card grids. It rejects brutalist / maximalist type — no oversized display that sacrifices readability for impact, no type experiments that turn the page into noise. And it refuses the warm beige / cream / sand default: the light surface is a warm stone neutral (#E7E5E4), clearly stone, not paper-pulp. Warmth is carried by the writing, the type pairing, and one small green accent — never by a tinted near-white body.
keyCharacteristics: Reading-first: 68ch measure, 1.75 leading, serif body, contrast tuned for long sessions.
One voice: a single lime accent on ≤5% of any screen. Its rarity is the point.
Flat by default: no box-shadows on content; depth comes from opacity, tonal layering, and one ambient blur on the floating header.
Underline, don't button-ify: links use a thin underline that deepens on hover; never colored backgrounds or pill buttons for in-prose links.
Hand-crafted details: dashed-leader post lists, lime blockquote stripe, a floating blurred nav pill.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: The Garden Lime accent appears on ≤5% of any screen — the blockquote stripe, the Message tint, and that's it. Its rarity is the point. If you reach for it anywhere else, stop.

rules.name: The No-Beige Rule
rules.body: The light body is Warm Stone Paper (stone-200), not cream, sand, paper, parchment, or any near-white warm-tinted neutral in the OKLCH L 0.84–0.97 / C < 0.06 / hue 40–100 band. Warmth lives in the type and the voice, not the background.

rules.name: The 68-Character Rule
rules.body: The `.post` container is `max-width: 68ch`. The post column is the reading unit, not the page width. Never widen it; never let prose flow full-bleed.

rules.name: The Underline Rule
rules.body: In-prose links use a thin underline that deepens from Underline Faint to Ink Body on hover. Never use colored backgrounds, pill buttons, or gradient text for in-prose links.

rules.name: The Opacity-Honest Rule
rules.body: Opacity is not a contrast strategy. Muted text still needs ≥4.5:1 against its background. If opacity-40 or opacity-50 fails the contrast check, darken the ink instead.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. No box-shadow on cards, buttons, inputs, or prose containers. The header's backdrop-blur is the one ambient exception; everything else uses tonal layering and opacity for depth.

dos: Do cap prose measure at 68ch (.post { max-width: 68ch }). The post column is the reading unit.
Do use the three-family system as intended: Newsreader for reading, Inter Tight for titles, Geist for navigation/labels. Don't blur the roles.
Do keep body text contrast ≥4.5:1. Ink Body (zinc-800) on Warm Stone Paper (stone-200) passes; dark-mode Ink Soft (zinc-200) on Quiet Ink (zinc-950) passes. When in doubt, darken the ink.
Do use text-wrap: balance on h1–h3 and text-wrap: pretty on long prose to reduce orphans.
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion: every transition needs a crossfade or instant fallback.
Do keep the header's backdrop-blur as the single ambient lift. It earns its place by floating over scrolling content.
donts: Don't use the Garden Lime accent on more than 5% of any screen. Per The One Voice Rule, it's the blockquote stripe and the Message tint — nothing else.
Don't use SaaS landing-page tropes: hero-metric stat blocks, gradient accents, saturated banner sections, identical icon-card grids.
Don't use brutalist / maximalist type: oversized display that sacrifices readability for impact, type experiments that turn the page into noise.
Don't use a warm beige / cream / sand / paper / parchment body background. The No-Beige Rule: the light body is Warm Stone Paper (stone-200).
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe. The blockquote stripe is exactly 1px.
Don't use background-clip: text with a gradient (gradient text). Emphasis comes from weight or size, never a gradient fill.
Don't use box-shadows on cards, buttons, or inputs. The Flat-By-Default Rule: tonal layering and opacity carry depth.
Don't pair border: 1px solid X with a wide soft box-shadow (M ≥ 16px blur) on the same element. Pick one or none.
Don't round cards / sections / inputs beyond 10px. The header pill at 24px is the one exception.
Don't put a tiny uppercase tracked eyebrow above every section.
Don't use opacity-40 or opacity-50 on body text as a contrast strategy. Per The Opacity-Honest Rule, darken the ink instead.
